title: Reified : Kotlin
summary: Before we learn about reified, Generics in any language is the powerful features that allow us to define classes, methods and properties which are accessible using different data types while keeping a check of the compile-time type safety.
content:
Before we learn about reified,

Generics in any language is the powerful features that allow us to define classes, methods and properties which are accessible using different data types while keeping a check of the compile-time type safety.
